commentary_text: The model favors Uzbekistan at 46%, while the sportsbook consensus favors DR Congo at 45%—a reversal of favorites despite nearly identical market prices (Polymarket aligns with books on DR Congo). The largest single gap appears on the draw: the model assigns 30% versus the market's 26%, a 4-percentage-point spread. The divergence may reflect differences in how recent form, lineup changes, or injury news are weighted; the model's Elo-based approach cannot access information posted after its last update, whereas real-money markets continuously incorporate breaking news. This dashboard surfaces the disagreement as a signal worth monitoring, not as evidence either source has mispriced the match.
